plugins.name: harry-blog
plugins.description: Publish any HTML artifact as a full post on the harrytruong Next.js blog — splits the file into scoped styles/html/script, scaffolds the post route, registers metadata, and ships via the owner-attributed PR workflow Vercel requires.

plugins.name: akila-confluence
plugins.description: Publish to Confluence with images/attachments — wraps the Atlassian MCP and adds a REST helper to render figures, upload attachments, and embed them, preserving visualization the storage format would strip.

plugins.name: openai-agents-tracing
plugins.description: Integrate OAT (OpenAI Agents Tracing) dashboard into OpenAI Agent SDK projects

plugins.name: context-engineering
plugins.description: Context engineering audit for AI agent codebases — reviews prompts, tools, handoffs, guardrails, and memory management

plugins.name: plugin-dev
plugins.description: Guide for developing, versioning, releasing, and self-updating Claude Code plugins via Git-based marketplaces

plugins.name: akila-omniverse
plugins.description: Switch the Akila web-user-platform USD viewer into local streaming debug mode — point it at a local Kit/Omniverse streaming server, disable auth/WSS, set the datacenter, and fix the Windows dev-build prerequisites.
